response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content, which consists of a VTuber presenting birthday merchandise and upcoming events. The audio throughout the video is instrumental background music. As no vocal music was detected, contains_vocal_music is set to false for all scenes and no song metadata or lyrics were searched for.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional presentation by the VTuber Hakui Koyori, introducing her 2026 birthday merchandise collection. The video features her speaking, slideshows of the merchandise, and instrumental background music throughout. No vocal songs are performed.

scenes.description: VTuber Hakui Koyori introduces her 2026 birthday merchandise collection.
Slideshow presentation of the birthday merchandise items.
Announcement of upcoming events, including a new music video and a live stream.
Static image of artwork with instrumental music playing to the end.
